email_subject: Sollicitatie — Front Office & Customer Service Medewerker
email_body:
Beste mevrouw Blaaser,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Front Office & Customer Service Medewerker in de metaalsector bij Lagom Engineering. Uw oproep voor een warm onthaal, administratieve nauwkeurigheid en vlotte communicatie sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto werk ik dagelijks met klanten, collega’s en systemen om projecten soepel te laten verlopen. Ik ben gewend om orders en content te verwerken, overzicht te bewaren en problemen op te lossen. Mijn eerdere ervaring in logistiek bij Katoen Natie heeft mijn oog voor detail en efficiëntie versterkt.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 – ik volg momenteel lessen om dit verder te verbeteren. Daarnaast heb ik basiskennis Frans. Ik leer snel nieuwe systemen aan en neem graag initiatief.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Ms. Blaaser,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Front Office & Customer Service Medewerker position in the metal sector at Lagom Engineering. Your call for a warm welcome, administrative accuracy, and smooth communication aligns perfectly with my experience.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I work daily with clients, colleagues, and systems to keep projects running smoothly. I am used to processing orders and content, maintaining overview, and solving problems. My earlier experience in logistics at Katoen Natie has strengthened my eye for detail and efficiency.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 – I am currently taking classes to improve further. I also have basic knowledge of French. I quickly learn new systems and take initiative.

I would be happy to discuss my motivation in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste mevrouw Blaaser,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Front Office & Customer Service Medewerker in de metaalsector bij Lagom Engineering. Uw oproep voor een warm onthaal, administratieve nauwkeurigheid en vlotte communicatie sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en persoonlijkheid.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto werk ik dagelijks met klanten, collega’s en systemen om projecten soepel te laten verlopen. Ik ben gewend om orders en content te verwerken, overzicht te bewaren en problemen op te lossen. Mijn eerdere ervaring in logistiek bij Katoen Natie heeft mijn oog voor detail en efficiëntie versterkt. Ik ben positief ingesteld en leer snel nieuwe systemen aan.

U zoekt iemand die bezoekers warm onthaalt en klanten helpt met vragen over bestellingen. Bij Episto ben ik het aanspreekpunt voor klanten over hun projecten en zorg ik dat alles correct verloopt. Ik werk samen met collega’s van sales, logistiek en productie om de dagelijkse flow te bewaken. Administratie zie ik niet als een last, maar als een manier om structuur te brengen.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 – ik volg momenteel lessen om dit verder te verbeteren. Daarnaast heb ik basiskennis Frans. Ik neem graag initiatief om processen te verbeteren en denk actief mee.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een persoonlijk gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Ms. Blaaser,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Front Office & Customer Service Medewerker position in the metal sector at Lagom Engineering. Your call for a warm welcome, administrative accuracy, and smooth communication aligns perfectly with my experience and personality.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I work daily with clients, colleagues, and systems to keep projects running smoothly. I am used to processing orders and content, maintaining overview, and solving problems. My earlier experience in logistics at Katoen Natie has strengthened my eye for detail and efficiency. I have a positive attitude and quickly learn new systems.

You are looking for someone who warmly welcomes visitors and helps customers with questions about their orders. At Episto, I am the point of contact for clients regarding their projects and ensure everything runs correctly. I collaborate with colleagues from sales, logistics, and production to monitor the daily flow. I see administration not as a burden, but as a way to bring structure.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 – I am currently taking classes to improve further. I also have basic knowledge of French. I take initiative to improve processes and actively think along.

I would be happy to discuss my motivation in a personal interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Customer-facing experience: daily client contact, order processing, and problem-solving at Episto
• Administrative accuracy and efficiency: maintained overview in high-volume logistics at Katoen Natie
• Strong communication in English and Turkish, B1 Dutch (actively improving), basic French
• Quick learner of new systems and tools, proactive in improving processes
• Positive, structured, and detail-oriented: thrives in dynamic environments with short communication lines
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Front Office & Customer Service · Administrative Support · Client Relations
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with strong customer-facing and administrative experience. At Episto, I handle client communication, order processing, and project coordination, ensuring smooth workflows and accurate follow-through. My background in logistics has sharpened my attention to detail and ability to maintain overview in fast-paced environments. I am positive, quick to learn new systems, and proactive in solving problems. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. Fluent in English and Turkish; Dutch B1 (actively improving); basic French.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & front office: warm reception, client communication, order processing, problem-solving
- Administrative accuracy: data entry, documentation, maintaining overview under pressure
- Coordination & teamwork: collaboration with sales, logistics, and production teams
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1), French (basic)
- Digital tools: Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, WordPress, CRM systems (familiar)
- Quick learner: adapts rapidly to new software and workflows

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Serve as primary point of contact for clients, handling inquiries and ensuring project milestones are met
- Process orders and content updates, coordinating with internal teams to maintain workflow
- Maintain accurate records and track project progress using digital tools
- Collaborate with sales and production colleagues to align client expectations with deliverables

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Ensured proper documentation and order fulfillment, contributing to smooth operations

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver web application features on time
- Developed problem-solving skills and attention to detail in a technical environment

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Managed end-to-end project coordination, client communication, and content delivery
- Implemented structured data and optimized user experience, demonstrating analytical and organizational skills

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
